creator: rich@math.missouri.edu
text:
When creating the ports software hierarchy X11R6 is made to point to
/usr/local.
The problem is when the software resides on a distribution server, when the
distribution root is not necessarily the host's root, causing the link to point
to the wrong "local".  Please make X11R6 -> local

Fix: 

buried somewhere in the ports makefiles I assume
How-To-Repeat: install ports in a new system
